task: feat: gerenciamento de sessões — listar, retomar e exportar histórico (issue #33)

todos.title: Extend sessions DB table schema with task, model, duration, last_activity columns and add migration

Implement GetSessionDetail, ListSessionsDetail, UpdateSession, DeleteSession in SQLiteStore
Create internal/session/session.go with Session domain struct and UUIDv4 short ID (8-char) generator
Create internal/session/manager.go with Manager wrapping db.Store — List, Get, Create, Update, Delete, Stats
Create internal/session/export.go with ExportMarkdown and ExportJSON functions including messages, tool calls, file access, cost, tokens
Add cobra 'devon sessions' command group with list, resume <id>, export <id>, delete <id>, stats subcommands in cmd/devon/main.go
Create internal/tui/sessionpicker.go with Bubble Tea model for keyboard-navigable session picker overlay
Wire session picker into TUI Run flow — show picker on startup before main chat model
Persist current session (messages, tool calls, cost) to DB during agent run for crash recovery
Write tests for internal/session/ — Manager CRUD, Export formats, edge cases
Run full build, test, vet, and lint suite until green
